title: High stakes battle in Gaighat as rival candidates file affidavits
snippet_text: The election filing process completed today in Gaighat. Multi-millionaire candidates and independent leaders enter the fray, making the contest highly unpredictable.

title: Bihar Elections 2025: Key issues dominate debates in Gaighat
snippet_text: As the election campaign intensifies, voters in Gaighat assembly constituency raise questions about infrastructure development, road connectivity, and agricultural support schemes.

title: Voter turnout expected to touch record highs in Gaighat
snippet_text: Electoral awareness campaigns and intense political mobilization by party workers point to a high turnout of youth and women voters in Gaighat constituency.

title: Welfare scheme execution becomes election issue in Gaighat
snippet_text: Local reports indicate that MGNREGA work allocations and PMAY home delivery rates are taking center stage in public debates across Gaighat assembly segment.
